content:
𝗠𝗲𝗲𝘁 𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗼𝗿𝗴𝗮𝗻𝗶𝘇𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗺𝗶𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗲

We are proud to introduce the Organising Committee for the Foreign Direct Investment International Arbitration Moot 2026 – South Asia Regional Championship & Global Qualifying Rounds.

United by a shared commitment to excellence, we are working to create a competition that inspires learning, fosters meaningful connections, and upholds the spirit of international arbitration.

𝗪𝗲𝗯:https://lnkd.in/gmmA-X8X
𝗘𝗺𝗮𝗶𝗹: fdisar2026@lloydlawcollege.edu.in

We look forward to welcoming you to Lloyd Law College, Greater Noida, from 30 July to 2 August 2026, for an unforgettable experience.

Sanjeev Nirwani (Goel), Shirsho Ghosh, Akshat Garg 

Vasavi T. Arpita Kandpal Somya Tiwari Nikita K Arpit Jain Vaishnavi Dwivedi Ishmita Jindal Aditya Raj Vedanta Dutta Darshan Agrawal Anmol Raj singh Bhumi Gupta
